title: MD-4 medical droid
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{DroidSeries |image=[[File:Mdmedical.jpg]] |name=MD-3 (Emdee-three) medical droid |creator= |manufacturer=[[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' |designer= |homeworld=[[Telti/Legends|Telti]]''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' |line=[[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series medical droid]] |model= |class=[[Class one droid/Legends|Class one droid]]''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' |degree= |cost=2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |length= |width= |height=1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]{{FactFile|96|MED 5-6|MD Medical Specialist}} |mass= |gender= |sensor=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |plating=Gray |armament= |equipment= *Detachable hands *[[Medical diagnostic computer]] *[[Microsurgery tool]]s *[[Photoreceptor/Legends|Photoreceptors]] *Surgical gown *Tool mount *[[Vocabulator/Legends|Vocabulator]] |affiliation= |firstmade= |retired= }} {{Quote|I live to serve.''"
"''You're dead and still serving. The Emdee-fours should have let you die.|Colonel "Antar Roat" and a customs official on Coruscant|''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''}} The '''MD-4''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was slightly [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in appearance. This [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model had specialized appendages for performing microsurgical procedures and could perform these without assistance. ==Description== [[File:MD-4_microsurgery.jpg|thumb|left|The MD-4's microsurgery appendage]] [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton's]] MD-4 [[Class one droid/Legends|class one droid]] was part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]]. Related to the [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]]—another of Industrial Automaton's products—in terms of aesthetic design, it was 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|Imperial standard meters]] tall and had a torso unit with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] topped by a cranial unit. The legs were shrouded in a surgical gown to protect delicate internal mechanisms. MD-4 droids were ambidextrous. MD-series droids generally had [[Color/Legends|gray]] plating and green highlights. The [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] were yellow. Costing 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], MD-4s were available for purchase throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The torso was the location of a connection socket to allow the droid to directly connect to a [[Computer/Legends|computer]]. The MD-4 employed [[reduction servomotor]]s and [[Reduction actuator|actuators]] to give their arms slow, precise movements to perform complex surgical procedures. ==Role== MD-4 droids were intended for surgical purposes, with specialized microsurgical appendages, including miniaturized [[vibroscapel]]s, [[Flexclamp/Legends|flex clamps]], and fiber optics. ==History== Constructed on the [[droid factory]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]], they were employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Aboard the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', an MD-4 droid oversaw the surgical unit.''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'' Three MD-4 droids served under [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Momaw Mowadan]] aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] Antar Roat, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' cover identity to infiltrate [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], was said to have been treated for battle injuries by MD-4s. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=The Farlander Papers|book=Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)}} {{Mo}} *[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1stm}} *''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Sources== *''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' {{ID|Emdee-four (MD-4)}} *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' {{ID|MD-4}} *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] {{ID|MD-4}} *[[The Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Star Wars Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] {{ID|Emdee-four (MD-4)}} *''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *{{FactFile|9|MAN 1-2|Droid Manufacturers}} *''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' *{{FactFile|96|MED 5-6|MD Medical Specialist}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|MD-4}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=MD-4 }} [[Category:Droid models of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:MD-series medical droid models|MD-04]]
